states.name: requested
states.description: Authorized cancellation request was durably created.
entry_requirements: Subject, scope, cleanup class, reason and authority exist.

states.name: acknowledged
states.description: Control plane or current producer acknowledged the request.
entry_requirements: Acknowledgement evidence is current and correlated.

states.name: completing
states.description: Cancellation and required cleanup/rollback actions are in progress.
entry_requirements: Cleanup plan and current execution context are recorded.

states.name: completed
states.description: Cancellation reached the declared cleanup and termination boundary.
entry_requirements: Decision outcome and cleanup/termination evidence exist.

states.name: rejected
states.description: Cancellation was not permitted or lost a completion race under policy.

states.name: expired
states.description: Cancellation deadline elapsed before effect under declared policy.

required_preconditions: Requestor has cancellation authority over exact subject/scope.
Current subject execution generation accepted cancellation handling.
Cancellation or cleanup work is active.
Declared cancellation boundary and cleanup requirements are satisfied.
Typed denial or completion-race outcome exists.
